caption: The video begins with a static image of a black screen featuring a central pink circle with a white letter "C" inside it. The name "Christopher Albuquerque" is displayed in white text at the bottom left corner of the screen. This initial frame remains unchanged, suggesting that it might be an opening title or logo sequence. There is no visible movement or transition between the frames provided, indicating that this part of the video is likely meant to introduce the creator or channel before transitioning into the main content. The simplicity and minimalism of the design focus attention on the branding element.
